briefdescription.para: AES Block Complete Handler.
AES Block Sync Error Handler.
AES Channel Status Updated Handler.
Audio Underflow Detected Handler.
Number of handler types.
these constants specify different types of handlers and is used to differentiate interrupt requests from the I2s Transmitter peripheral.
Channel disabled.
AXI-Stream Audio Channel 0 and 1.
AXI-Stream Audio Channel 2 and 3.
AXI-Stream Audio Channel 4 and 5.
AXI-Stream Audio Channel 6 and 7.
Wave Generator.
This typedef specifies the input sources of the the I2s Transmitter.
Channel 0.
Channel 1.
Channel 2.
Channel 3.
Number of Channel ID's.
These constants specify different channel ID's.
Left Justification is enabled.
Right Justification is enabled.
This typedef specifies the justification of the the XI2s Transmitter.
Callback function pointer type for I2S Transmitter events.

detaileddescription.para: This typedef defines the signature for callback functions that are invoked in response to I2S transmitter events or interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: A void pointer to user-defined callback reference data. This parameter allows the callback to access context-specific information passed during callback registration.

simplesect.para: The callback function should not perform blocking operations or lengthy computations, as it may be called from an interrupt context.

briefdescription.para: This inline function reads the I2s Transmitter version.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This inline function clears the specified interrupt of the XI2s Transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.
is a bit mask of the interrupts to be cleared.

simplesect.para: XI2stx_hw.h file for the available interrupt masks.

briefdescription.para: This inline function enables the I2s Transmitter logging.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This inline function disables the I2s Transmitter logging.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.

briefdescription.para: Runs a self-test on the driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: The self-test is reads the version register, configuration registers and verifies the values

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful i.e. if the self test passes.
XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful i.e. if the self test fails

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XI2stx_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xi2stx_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the I2S Transmitter core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the I2S Transmitter.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the I2S Transmitter includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the I2s Transmitter.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the I2s Transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the I2s Transmitter.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the input source for the specified I2s channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
specifies the I2s channel
specifies the input source

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE : if the I2s channel is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the SCLK Output divider value of the I2S timing generator.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
is the frequency of the MClk.

is the sampling frequency of the system. Divider value for the SCLK generation, MCLK/SCLK = SCLKOUT_DIV x 2 i.e. MCLK = 384xFs, SCLK = 48xFs (2x24bits) -> SCLKOUT_DIV = MCLK/SCLK/2 = 4 Valid values are 1 through 15.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE if SCLK Output divider is not calculated to be a positive integer.
XST_SUCCESS, otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the specified interrupt of the I2s Transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
is a bit mask of the interrupts to be enabled.

simplesect.para: XI2stx_hw.h for the available interrupt masks.

briefdescription.para: Disables interrupts for the I2S Transmitter instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables one or more interrupts for the specified I2S Transmitter instance based on the provided interrupt mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance to be worked on.
A bitmask specifying which interrupts to disable. Each bit in the mask corresponds to a specific interrupt source.

simplesect.para: The caller is responsible for ensuring that InstancePtr is a valid pointer to an initialized XI2s_Tx instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the justification.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s Transmitter instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the justification.

briefdescription.para: This function is to enable right/left justification.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s Transmitter instance.

is a enum to select the left or right justification.
XI2S_TX_JUSTIFY_LEFT : Left justification
XI2S_TX_JUSTIFY_RIGHT : Right justification

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the I2S Transmitter driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the pending interrupt from the I2S Transmitter peripheral, determines the source of the interrupts, clears the interrupts and calls callbacks accordingly.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function -------------------------------- ------------------------- (XI2S_TX_HANDLER_AES_BLKCMPLT) AesBlkCmpltHandler (XI2S_TX_HANDLER_AES_BLKSYNCERR) AesBlkSyncErrHandler (XI2S_TX_HANDLER_AES_CHSTSUPD) AesChStsUpdHandler (XI2S_TX_HANDLER_AUD_UNDRFLW) AudUndrflwHandler

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is a pointer to the callback function.
is a reference pointer passed on actual calling of the callback function.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the captured AES Channel Status bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
is a pointer to a buffer that is used for writing the AES Channel Status bits, this needs to be allocated by user application

briefdescription.para: This function clears the captured AES Channel Status bits.

detaileddescription.para: This will clear all the 6 channel status registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the contents of the logging buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance.

briefdescription.para: This function writes I2S Transmitter logs into the buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance.
is the log event type.
is the log data.

simplesect.para: Log write can be done only if the log is enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the next item in the logging buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance.

simplesect.para: When the buffer is filled, the next log item is returned. When the buffer is empty, NULL is returned.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the contents of the logging buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance.
